violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of some market shelves have an accumulation of dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The dumpster enclosure is in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2025
The dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of trash, wood, and debris. The dumpster enclosure must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The floors in the back area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerators and product shelving have an accumulation of dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023
The area near the dumpster has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and plastic crates. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

The walls in the mop sink area are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
